subcodes.title: Words to Consul Schwartz and Dr Faber, spoken on 1913-04-29
subcodes.first_line: The greatest need of Europe is the organization of a European congress in which the delegates of various powers may discuss seriously the possibility of immediate, concurrent disarmament
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @the Lesser Peace and the Most Great Peace, @parliaments; constitutional government, @true liberty; freedom
